content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-029)

## CRITICAL / HIGH (from lean-auditor iter029)
1. **EXCISE the dead fold-family decls in a dedicated refactor** (must-fix #1, repeat of lvbc iter-027).
   `ring_square_cocycle` (L2017) sorry covers an UNPROVABLE statement (missing cocycle-equality hypothesis);
   `ring_square_glue_natTrans` (in-comment sorry @L1950); `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue`
   (L2265) ‚Äî the entire `‚â™‚â´`-fold + mate-glue family is DEAD (ARCHON_MEMORY: "STOP the fold family") and is
   now SUPERSEDED by Route A's `pullbackSpecTilde_ringSquare_vcomp_glue`. Leaving an unprovable sorry'd
   statement in-tree is a latent false-axiom risk for any caller. Refactor: delete these + retarget the crux
   `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` `exact` to the surviving route. ONE refactor agent (do NOT
   concurrently prove). Sync blueprint `\uses` after.
2. **Fix the no-op `set_option maxHeartbeats ‚Ä¶ in /-! -/`** (must-fix #2/#3; flagged 3 iters running) @L2581,
   L2616‚Äì2619. They are consumed by doc-comment commands ‚Üí `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` etc. run on the
   default budget. These decls are dead-mate apparatus (bare sorry) so live work is unaffected, but the bug is
   misleading ‚Äî fold into the dead-mate excision refactor (ARCHON_MEMORY already queues `base_change_mate_*`
   excision; keep `base_change_mate_regroupEquiv` + `base_change_map_affine_local`).

## FBC Route A ‚Äî the live frontier (prover, after the gate)
3. **Prove `pullbackSpecTilde_ringSquare_vcomp_glue`** (~L2355) ‚Äî the genuine remaining content, now a clean
   functor-level target (statement bomb-free). It is the `conjugateIsoEquiv`-conjugate of the PROVEN
   `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp`; legs dischargeable by `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate` +
   `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp` (iter-018). Drive by `conjugateEquiv_comp` SPLITS +
   `mateEquiv_vcomp` (pseudofunctoriality of `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso`); NEVER `unit_conjugateEquiv` over the
   composite (composite-unit whnf ‚Üí 200k bomb, per ARCHON_MEMORY). This is the genuine ~10-iter wall ‚Äî assign
   a focused lane, expect it to be hard.
4. **Decide the extraction budget for `‚Ä¶_natural_catCommSq`** (~L2423). The `.app M` extraction recipe is
   VERIFIED CORRECT (task_result L52‚Äì61) but needs >350k heartbeats; sub-lemma splitting re-incurs the carrier
   whnf. Two options: (a) sanction a per-decl heartbeat allowance for THIS single decl (recipe is verified ‚Äî
   cheapest, but breaks the project's no-`maxHeartbeats`-bump norm); (b) a lighter-carrier reformulation of
   `tilde`/`pullback` (expensive, helps elsewhere too). Planner must pick before re-assigning this decl ‚Äî
   do NOT re-send a prover at it without a budget decision (it will just re-hit the wall).
5. **Architectural: change `@[reducible]` ‚Üí semireducible on `pullbackSpecTildeCatCommSq`** (auditor major).
   `@[reducible]` invites the kernel to unfold the `CatCommSq` wrapper over heavy carriers ‚Äî inconsistent with
   Route A's whnf-avoidance goal and with the deliberately-semireducible `pullbackSpecTildeVCompIso`. Low-risk
   one-line refactor; verify the vComp paste still elaborates after.

## Blueprint (writer, before next FBC prover lane on this chapter)
6. **Rewrite `lem:‚Ä¶_natural_catCommSq` prose + add a `vcomp_glue` block** (lvbc-fbc029 major; `% NOTE:` marker
   placed). The current sketch (6-leg hComp+vComp "fillings agree", claims to avoid the mate apparatus) does
   NOT match the landed vComp-dictionary-pair + whiskered-comparison + `conjugateIsoEquiv`-conjugate mechanism.
   Add a blueprint block for `pullbackSpecTilde_ringSquare_vcomp_glue` (the sorry-bearing crux core) and the
   `pullbackSpecTildeVCompIso` machinery. HARD GATE: this chapter is then `partial/false` until a fresh
   blueprint-reviewer pass clears it ‚Äî re-run the gate before sending a prover at the catCommSq/vcomp_glue decls.

## Coverage debt (`archon dag-query unmatched` = 91)
7. Blueprint the 5 new FBC helpers (all unmatched): `pullbackSpecTildeCatCommSq`, `pullbackSpecTildeVCompIso`,
   `pullbackSpecTildeVCompIso_hom_app`, `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_eq_natApp`,
   `pullbackSpecTilde_ringSquare_vcomp_glue`. Pre-existing FBC unmatched: `chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat`,
   `chartBaseChangePushforwardNat`, `chartBaseChangeRestrictReassocNat`. The remaining ~69 are off-path SNAP
   `Modules.*` internals (deferred to the SNAP off-path-excision refactor, already queued).

## SNAP (separate lane ‚Äî pivoted in iter-029 plan; NOT this review's prover scope)
8. The iter-029 plan REFUTED œÑ as a category error and pivoted to the lax-monoidal route
   (`Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`; gate: verify `Œº_Œì = sectionsMul` defeq BEFORE excising the object
   wall). SNAP prover lane scheduled iter-030 (scaffold + tensorator-coincidence gate first). Object-level
   associator wall stays OFF the critical path ‚Äî do NOT iterate it.

## Do NOT retry (blocked / dead)
- The abstract `‚â™‚â´`-fold cocycle on ALL three sub-routes (carrier-bearing/carrier-free/eqToIso-bridge) ‚Äî DEAD,
  superseded by the `CatCommSq.vComp` reformulation. Excise per rec #1.
- `letI`/`haveI`/`instance` dictionary forms; `convert ‚Ä¶ <;> rfl`; `.hom`-level `rfl` geom bridge ‚Äî all
  whnf-bomb (see summary "Dead ends").
- Re-sending a prover at `‚Ä¶_natural_catCommSq` extraction WITHOUT a budget decision (rec #4) ‚Äî it will re-hit
  the >350k-hb wall regardless of tactic.
